summary: Add pp:happy-args fixtures to events get / places get / places calendars, a require-one-selector guard to places get, and pp:no-error-path-probe to tail.
reason: Live dogfood synthesized placeholder ids/UUIDs the API 4xx-rejects; these endpoints need real fixtures. places get with no selector returned an opaque API 400 instead of a usage error; tail tolerates an initial fetch failure by design.
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood 76/76 after fixtures + guard.
